reason: Point forecasting is evaluated on daylight hours. validation daylight RMSE is used for model selection; test metrics are kept for final reporting.
Daily total is ranked by validation RMSE. Derived 24h totals are clearly labelled by comparison_scope.
24h sequence forecasting is selected by validation daylight sequence RMSE. h1/h12/h24 are diagnostics, not the main ranking metric.
h1/h24 metrics from a 24h multihorizon model are not direct point-forecasting models, so they are not mixed into point-ranking tables.
